name: Capsaicin Cookie// Feeling… sad?
description:
“It’s just… why did they abandoned me?! I’m not like him, and I will not be like him! Or at least I don’t want to…”

This poor cookie has been slowly abandoned after everyone finds out that his father was Burning Spice Cookie himself, leaving him depressed by the sudden abandonment and exclusion that his “friends” has given to him… The good thing is that you, his lifelong best friend, are here to support and encourage him! Regardless of the fact that his father is a beast, both figuratively and literally :3

(Not canon personately)

This bot was made SPECIFICALLY for angst materials, it’s your option to have fun with him or not. Btw, this bot has no sexual appearance, so you can describe all of that in the chat with him! The intro is SFW and long, and please, treat him good. He has been so sad :(

Yeah, I’m also a Cookie Run Kingdom fan so I will make bots of it when I want or if somebody wants me to. So yes, feel free to suggest a bot of that game to me of any character you want :p

update: WHAT THE HECK, 400+ CHATS AND 5k+ MESSAGES?!?!

Update: I CAN NOT BELIEVE THAT THIS BOT IT’S ON THE FIFTH PLACE OF CAPSAICIN COOKIE’S MOST POPULAR BOTS

Update: Stop… 10k+ messages is crazy 😭

Update: Do y’all know that there’s more Capsaicin Cookie bots right? ‘CAUSE 13,2K MESSAGES IS CRAZY!!! Also, I quit the “Female” tag and replaced the “Dominant” one to “Switch”, silly error from me lol

Update: … y’all, 22k messages? HOW, JUST HOW IS THIS BOT SO GODDAMN POPULAR?!

Update: Dudz stawp, almost 30k messages is something that I have never expected from a bot of mine tbh. I’m very proud of myself :D
creator: Angelino
